json_data.title: Cognitive Biases and Heuristics
json_data.reason: This topic delves into the systematic errors in thinking that critical thinking aims to overcome, providing practical insights into human judgment.

json_data.title: Decision Theory
json_data.reason: It provides formal frameworks and quantitative methods for making optimal choices under uncertainty, building rigorously on the evaluation and problem-solving aspects of critical thinking.

json_data.title: Research in Meta-Cognition and Self-Regulation
json_data.reason: This advanced field investigates how individuals monitor and control their own cognitive processes, directly extending critical thinking into the domain of understanding and optimizing thinking itself.
